name: @uibit/hoistlock
description: Zero-build, ultra-fast bundle regression prevention utility in Rust

scripts.build: napi build --platform --release && cargo build --release --bin hoistlock-bin && cp target/release/hoistlock-bin bin/hoistlock-bin
scripts.build:debug: napi build --platform && cargo build --bin hoistlock-bin && cp target/debug/hoistlock-bin bin/hoistlock-bin
